overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along an urban highway overpass and continuing through city streets. The scene features bright sunny weather, palm trees, and moderate traffic in a Los Santos-style commercial district with the character navigating from an elevated walkway down to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway overpass walkway with highway overlook

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the overpass walkway overlooking the multi-lane highway below

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the pedestrian walkway
busy highway with multiple lanes of traffic flowing in both directions below the overpass
hilly terrain with scattered buildings and vegetation visible in the background
tall palm trees lining the left side of the view
modern commercial structures with glass facades visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated concrete overpass with a metal railing, overlooking a busy multi-lane highway. The view opens toward distant hills with palm trees and commercial buildings visible on the left, while traffic flows steadily below.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with highway access ramp and landscaped median

events.description: turns left off the overpass onto the street level road, leaving the highway overlook
large red truck passes by on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the road edge next to a red curb, moving away from the highway overlook

notable_agents.action: large red truck driving past the character on the left side of the road

entered.detail: paved city street with red painted curb marking the edge
large overhead metal sign structure spanning across the road
green median with trees and shrubs separating the road lanes

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a city street at ground level, walking along the asphalt road with a landscaped median on the right. A large red truck passes by on the left, and the highway overpass railing recedes into the background as the character moves away from the overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with traffic signals and landscaped median

events.description: character walks through the intersection as traffic lights change from green to red
continues straight through the intersection, navigating around stopped and moving vehicles

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and continuing down the city street, navigating around vehicles at the traffic light

notable_agents.action: silver sedan waiting at the red traffic light on the right side
white sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal mounted on pole showing red light
red circular sign with white horizontal bar indicating wrong way
curved concrete planter with dense greenery and trees

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses a city intersection with traffic lights and a landscaped median. A silver sedan waits at the red light while a white sports car passes through, and the character continues walking down the palm-lined street past a Do Not Enter sign.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from an elevated highway overlook into the bustling activity of a sunlit city street. It begins with the character walking along a concrete overpass beside a metal railing, overlooking a multi-lane highway with distant hills and palm trees on the horizon. As the character moves away from the overlook, the scene shifts to ground level where they turn left onto an asphalt road, passing a large red truck while the overpass recedes into the background. The camera then follows the character across a city intersection with traffic lights and a landscaped median, passing a waiting silver sedan and a speeding white sports car. Finally, the movement continues down the palm-lined street, passing a Do Not Enter sign as the urban environment fully unfolds.
